title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: delve and golang bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for delve is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
packages:
RHEL-88738
- Latest rhel-9.7 delve-1.24.1-2.el9 build has conflicting release number

fixes.description: golang net/http tests fail with "crypto/ecdh: use of X25519 is not allowed in FIPS 140-only mode" on GOLANG_FIPS=1
go1.24 panics when openssl is not available [rhel-9.7]
TestCmdGoNoHTTPServer from go net/http internal testsuite fails [rhel-9.7]
Latest rhel-9.7 delve-1.24.1-2.el9 build has conflicting release number

full_text:
An update for delve is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
